heading: dgram
body:
Atlas Functions support the following `dgram` APIs:

- [socket.addMembership](https://nodejs.org/api/dgram.html#dgram_socket_addmembership_multicastaddress_multicastinterface)

- [socket.address](https://nodejs.org/api/dgram.html#dgram_socket_address)

- [socket.bind](https://nodejs.org/api/dgram.html#dgram_socket_bind_port_address_callback)

- [socket.close](https://nodejs.org/api/dgram.html#dgram_socket_close_callback)

- [createSocket](https://nodejs.org/api/dgram.html#dgram_dgram_createsocket_options_callback)

- [socket.dropMembership](https://nodejs.org/api/dgram.html#dgram_socket_dropmembership_multicastaddress_multicastinterface)

- [socket.send](https://nodejs.org/api/dgram.html#dgram_socket_send_msg_offset_length_port_address_callback)

- [socket.setBroadcast](https://nodejs.org/api/dgram.html#dgram_socket_setbroadcast_flag)

- [socket.setMulticastLoopback](https://nodejs.org/api/dgram.html#dgram_socket_setmulticastloopback_flag)

- [socket.setMulticastTTL](https://nodejs.org/api/dgram.html#dgram_socket_setmulticastttl_ttl)

Atlas Functions do **not** support the following `dgram` APIs:

- [socket.ref](https://nodejs.org/api/dgram.html#dgram_socket_ref)

- [socket.setTTL](https://nodejs.org/api/dgram.html#dgram_socket_setttl_ttl)

- [socket.unref](https://nodejs.org/api/dgram.html#dgram_socket_unref)
